name: Modern Textured Ceramic Round Vase White - Threshold™: Elegant Bud Vase for Tabletop, Spot Clean, 7.75" Height
description:
Elevate any table display with this Ceramic Round Textured Vase from Threshold™. This round ceramic vase features a white textured finish to easily coordinate with any decor. The small round neck makes it perfect for displaying a few real or artificial blooms or dried stems. Set it atop your mantelpiece, console table, sideboard or shelf with other accent pieces to decorate your space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
